title: woof quality-gates configuration
description: Project-side declaration at .woof/quality-gates.toml. Tells Stage 5 Check 1 (project quality command) what to run after each story to verify build/lint/type/test all pass. Single command per gate; each must exit 0 or Stage 5 Check 1 fails.

gates.description: Named quality gates run in declaration order. Suggested keys: build, lint, type, test.

command.description: Shell command. Run from repo root. Must exit 0 to pass.

timeout_seconds.description: Hard timeout. Hitting it is treated as a check failure.

blocking.description: If false, a non-zero exit logs a finding but does not fail Stage 5 Check 1.
